title: SpecGate Binding File
description: Schema for SpecGate binding files — connects a spec to a language-specific implementation project.

language.description: Target language identifier. Selects the codegen backend.

targets.description: Named execution targets. Each key is a target name referenced by specs via the 'target' field.

targetDefinition.description: An execution target. All paths are relative to the binding file location.

package_root.description: Path to the package/crate/project root, relative to the binding file. Commands run from here.

test_root.description: Path to the directory where generated test files are written, relative to the binding file.

build.description: Optional build command to run before execution.

command.description: Shell command to execute the generated tests. Supports {spec_path} and {workdir} templates.

function.description: Fully qualified function to call, e.g. 'specgate_harness::Harness::run_spec'.

constructor.description: Fully qualified constructor for the receiver type (for api targets with methods).

file.description: Path to output file. Supports {workdir} template.
